title: Better Pumpkin Overlay
description: Changes the obtrusive pumpkin overlay to small text in the bottom-right corner!
body:
Other pumpkin overlay packs either make it too opaque or completely invisible. **What if you want to be able to see perfectly clearly while still being able to tell you're wearing a pumpkin?**

![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74e2e325532995c0e64d910ba700348b701d219.png)

This pack is made for 16:9 monitors, may appear stretched or squished in other size ratios.
